notification.package.in_transit: Your package {{package_id}} is on its way. Driver: {{driver_name}}.
notification.package.at_hub: Your package {{package_id}} is available at relay hub {{hub_name}}.
notification.package.deposit_confirmed: Deposit confirmed. Package {{package_id}} received at hub {{hub_name}}.
notification.delivery.assigned: New delivery mission available for package {{package_id}}.
notification.delivery.cancelled: Delivery of package {{package_id}} has been cancelled.
notification.delivery.rescheduled: Delivery of package {{package_id}} has been rescheduled.
error.route.unreachable: Delivery zone unreachable due to weather conditions.
error.hub.full: Hub {{hub_name}} is currently full. Please select another relay point.
error.driver.unavailable: No driver available in your area at this time.
error.payment.failed: Payment of {{amount}} {{currency}} failed. Please try again.
billing.invoice.generated: Your invoice of {{amount}} {{currency}} has been generated.
billing.wallet.credited: Your wallet has been credited with {{amount}} {{currency}}.
status.hub.deposit: Package dropped off at relay hub {{hub_name}}.
account.otp.sent: Your verification code is {{otp}}. Valid for {{duration}} minutes.
notify.freelancer_org.verified: 🎉 Congratulations! Your organization {{orgId}} has been verified (KYC level {{kycLevel}}). You can now accept missions on TiiBnTick.
notify.freelancer_org.kyc_level_upgraded: ✅ KYC level upgraded for organization {{orgId}}: now certified at level {{kycLevel}}. New features unlocked.
notify.freelancer_org.kyc_rejected: ❌ KYC verification for organization {{orgId}} was rejected. Reason: {{reason}}. Please submit updated documents.
notify.freelancer_org.suspended: ⚠️ Your organization {{orgId}} has been suspended. Reason: {{reason}}. Contact support for more information.
notify.freelancer_org.unsuspended: ✅ The suspension on your organization {{orgId}} has been lifted. You can resume your activities.
notify.freelancer_org.mission_assigned: 📦 Mission assigned to your organization {{freelancerOrgId}}. Delivery reference: {{deliveryId}}.
notify.sub_deliverer.mission_assigned: 🏍️ New mission {{deliveryId}} assigned for organization {{orgId}}. Prepare for pickup.
notify.billing.template_applied: 💼 Billing policy created from template {{templateCode}} by {{actorId}}. Policy ID: {{policyId}}.
CLIENT_QUOTE_RECEIVED: You received a quote from {{providerName}} for your request {{quoteRequestId}}.
ORDER_CONFIRMED: Your order {{orderId}} has been confirmed by {{providerName}}.
